description: Small fragment of a legal document. Dated: [1]454 Seleucid = 1142/43 CE, under the authority of Shemuʾel ha-Nagid (Shemuʾel b. Ḥananya) and referring to Abū l-Barakāt al-Ṭabīb (‘the physician’), also known as Ibn al-Sharābī (‘the potion maker/seller’). (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
